recommendations.overview: A communist kangaroo moves in with an artist in Berlin.

recommendations.title: Good Grief
recommendations.overview: When his husband unexpectedly dies, Marc's world shatters, sending him and his two best friends on a soul-searching trip to Paris that reveals some hard truths they each needed to face.
